summary: Good-quality audience recording of a memorable first-time Dead concert, though the show isn’t considered a top‑tier performance.
review: The tape captures an audience recording that manages to sound clear despite the notoriously difficult venue, offering a solid listening experience. Fans recall this as a cherished first Dead show with an enjoyable set, even if it isn’t hailed as one of the band’s strongest performances.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews praise the audience recording for its clarity and note the show is enjoyable but not a standout performance, leading to a solid combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Despite a tough venue that makes live hearing difficult, the audience tape captures the music clearly and is considered a good recording compared to other sources from this night.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally enjoyable and memorable for first‑time listeners; reviewers describe it as a good show but not among the band’s best.
